title: perf(fj-ad): dense f64 square-plus-linear reduce-sum reverse-mode fast path

target.profile_basis: fresh rch Criterion profile ranked ad/grad_sum_x2_plus_x_1k as the dominant fj-ad row at about 4.9748 us before this pass

alien_primitive.name: expression-template reverse-mode fusion
alien_primitive.source: alien_cs_graveyard AD/composable differentiation and staged-expression entries
alien_primitive.description: Guard a narrow dense-F64 Jaxpr shape and execute the primal and adjoint program as one scratch-array pass instead of building generic Value/Tape/eval_primitive intermediates.

benchmark.command: RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target/rch-b6vaq-... rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-ad --bench ad_baseline -- ad/grad_sum_x2_plus_x_1k --sample-size 20 --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 3
benchmark.rch_mode: local fallback for both scored baseline and final candidate because no admissible workers were available

rejected_intermediate.description: generic dense Add/Mul/ReduceSum tape with Vec<f64> slots

isomorphism_proof.ordering_preserved: Forward order is exactly x*x, then square+x, then left-to-right ReduceSum over the dense input order. Backward accumulation is 1.0 from Add, then +x, then +x from repeated Mul, matching the generic reverse traversal for this Jaxpr.
isomorphism_proof.tie_breaking: N/A: no comparisons, sorting, arg selection, or ties.
isomorphism_proof.floating_point: bit-identical for the guarded shape; dense_f64_square_plus_linear_reducesum_matches_generic_bits compares output and gradient raw bits against the forced generic path, including signed zero, infinity, and NaN payload coverage.
isomorphism_proof.fallbacks: Custom primitive VJPs, custom Jaxpr VJPs, custom rule keys, constvars, effects, params, sub-Jaxprs, non-F64 tensors, non-dense storage, non-exact Jaxpr shape, or different Add input ordering all fall back to the existing generic path.

validation.details: reported unchanged fj-trace dependency warning: unused variable num_spatial
blocked by unchanged fj-trace unused variable and fj-lax clippy debt; --no-deps additionally exposes unchanged fj-ad lints in reduce_window, conv_vjp_grouped, scatter JVP, and tests
UBS style/build sections were clean, but file-wide pre-existing panic/unwrap/assert/direct-index inventory remains nonzero
